code:
from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# Predicate mapping - defined at module level to avoid recreation
PREDICATE_MAPPING = {
    "birthDate": "{subject} was born on {object}",
    "deathDate": "{subject} died on {object}",
    "birthPlace": "{subject} was born in {object}",
    "deathPlace": "{subject} died in {object}",
    "origin": "{subject} originates from {object}",
    "nationality": "{subject} is {object}",
    "genre": "{subject} performs {object}",
    "instrument": "{subject} plays the {object}",
    "occupation": "{subject} works as a {object}",
    "associatedBand/associatedMusicalArtist": "{subject} is associated with {object}",
    "recordLabel": "{subject} is signed to {object}",
    "activeYearsStartYear": "{subject} started their career in {object}",
    "activeYearsEndYear": "{subject} ended their career in {object}",
    "capital": "whose capital is {object}",
    "country": "in {object}",
    "language": "with {object}",
    "officialLanguage": "with official language {object}",
    "parentCompany": "owned by {object}",
    "bandMember": "including {object}",
    "leader": "led by {object}",
    "leaderTitle": "with leader title {object}",
    "background": "a {object}",
    "alternativeName": "also known as {object}",
    "birthYear": "{subject} was born in {object}",
    "professionalField": "working in {object}",
    "musicFusionGenre": "fusing {object}",
    "musicSubgenre": "a subgenre of {object}",
    "stylisticOrigin": "originating from {object}",
    "derivative": "influencing {object}",
    "location": "located in {object}",
    "governingBody": "governed by {object}",
    "ethnicGroup": "with {object} ethnic group",
    "distributingCompany": "distributed by {object}",
    "training": "trained at {object}",
    "populationDensity": "with population density {object}",
    "meaning": "meaning {object}",
    "longName": "long name {object}",
    "areaTotal": "covering {object}",
    "foundingDate": "founded in {object}",
    "elevationAboveTheSeaLevel": "at {object} above sea level",
    "postalCode": "with postal codes {object}",
    "isPartOf": "part of {object}",
    "demonym": "residents called {object}",
    "currency": "using {object}",
    "anthem": "anthem {object}",
}

RELATIVE_PREDICATES = {"country", "capital", "location", "origin", "birthPlace", "deathPlace", "isPartOf"}

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    """
    Convert a list of triples about an artist into a single fluent sentence.
    Optimized for performance while maintaining coherence.
    """
    if not triples:
        return ""

    # Get the main subject (first triple's subject)
    main_subject = triples[0].subject

    # Build phrases directly from triples
    phrases = []
    for t in triples:
        template = PREDICATE_MAPPING.get(t.predicate, "{subject} {predicate} {object}")
        phrase = template.format(subject=t.subject, object=t.object)
        phrases.append(phrase)

    if not phrases:
        return ""

    # Connect all phrases with commas and 'and' for the last one
    if len(phrases) == 1:
        return phrases[0] + "."
    elif len(phrases) == 2:
        return phrases[0] + " and " + phrases[1] + "."
    else:
        # Join all but last with commas, add 'and' before last
        result = ", ".join(phrases[:-1]) + ", and " + phrases[-1] + "."
        return result

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
